title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: CHILDREN'S ADVOCACY CENTER OF LINCOLN COUNTY CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations, and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides on-site and off-site therapy and counseling referrals, safety planning, advocacy services, and community training. 122 NE 47th Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Ages 3-18; may accommodate adults over age 18 with developmental disabilities Hours: Varies Email (541) 574-0841 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 574-0841 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Referrals must be made by ODHS or law enforcement. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lincoln County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Child Abuse Counseling Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHILDREN'S ADVOCACY CENTER OF LINCOLN COUNTY
